basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Design Madhya Pradesh (NIDMP)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Design Madhya Pradesh (NIDMP) Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nidmp.ac.in. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the NIDMP Faculty Recruitment 2026 for Principal Designer and Senior Faculty/Designer posts.

age_limit.age_details: Principal Designer: Not exceeding 55 years. Senior Faculty/Designer: Not exceeding 50 years.
age_limit.details: Principal Designer (Professor): Not exceeding 55 years. Senior Faculty / Designer (Associate Professor): Not exceeding 50 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST - 05 years, OBC (NCL) - 03 years, Ex-Servicemen - 5 years for Group A posts.

qualification.details: Essential: Post Graduate Degree/ Diploma in Design from a recognized University / reputed Institution. Desirable: Doctorate in Design. Specialization Required: CGI Character Animation, 2D-3D Rigged animation, stop motion/ Claymation, Hands on experience in Animation production, Story Telling and Script Writing, Direction, Editing, Cinematography. Spatial Sound Design, and Visual Effects, Publication & Print design, Illustration and Image Making, Experience / Interaction Design, Visual Grammar, Communication Theory, Typography, Ergonomics, Cognitive Ergonomics, Human Factors, User-Centered Design, Human-machine Interface, Styling & Representation Techniques, Surface Modeling, Knitting, Craft based Textile, Surface development, Printing & Dyeing, Sustainable Textile and related areas of textile design, Design Management, Service Design, System Design, Design Fundamentals, Design Process, Geometry Construction, Analytical sketching, Color Composition, Cultural anthropology, material (non-textile) handling and related areas of Design. Experience: Minimum of 10 years in the relevant field of Design. | Essential: Post Graduate Degree/ Diploma in Design from a recognized University / reputed Institution. Desirable: Doctorate in Design. Specialization Required: CGI Character Animation, 2D-3D Rigged animation, stop motion/ Claymation, Hands on experience in Animation production, Story Telling and Script Writing, Direction, Editing, Cinematography. Spatial Sound Design, and Visual Effects, Publication & Print design, Illustration and Image Making, Experience / Interaction Design, Visual Grammar, Communication Theory, Typography, Ergonomics, Cognitive Ergonomics, Human Factors, User-Centered Design, Human-machine Interface, Styling & Representation Techniques, Surface Modeling, Knitting, Craft based Textile, Surface development, Printing & Dyeing, Sustainable Textile and related areas of textile design, Design Management, Service Design, System Design, Design Fundamentals, Design Process, Geometry Construction, Analytical sketching, Color Composition, Cultural anthropology, material (non-textile) handling and related areas of Design. Experience: Minimum 10 years in relevant field of Design.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 13 for Principal Designer, Pay Level 12 for Senior Faculty/Designer
salary_details.details: Principal Designer (Professor): Pay Level 13 of the 7th CPC pay matrix Senior Faculty / Designer (Associate Professor): Pay Level 12 of the 7th CPC pay matrix

selection_process: Document Verification Selection Process (may include Group Discussion
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIDMP Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nidmp.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIDMP Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the hard copy of the applications for NIDMP Faculty positions is 01 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Faculty posts at NIDMP?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for Faculty positions, including Principal Designer and Senior Faculty/Designer.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in Design from a recognized University or reputed Institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Principal Designer post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Principal Designer post is not exceeding 55 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Senior Faculty/Designer post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Senior Faculty/Designer post is not exceeding 50 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for UR/OBC/EWS candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for UR, EWS, and OBC (Non-creamy layer) candidates is ₹ 1000/- payable by Demand Draft.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for SC/ST/PwD/Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, SC, ST, PwD, Ex-Servicemen, and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for NIDMP Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process may include Document Verification, Group Discussion, Presentation, Teaching Demonstration, and Interviews.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary for the Principal Designer post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Principal Designer post is Pay Level 13 of the 7th CPC pay matrix.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary for the Senior Faculty/Designer post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Faculty/Designer post is Pay Level 12 of the 7th CPC pay matrix.
